questions.question: What U.S. city boasts a record-high one car for every two people?
What series signed a pact with NBC for a record $13 million per episode, in 1998?
What pacifist had a name that translated as "Action-Slave Fascination-Moon Grocer" but was simply nicknamed "Bapu"?
What must a meteor do to become a meteorite?
What brand doubled the sales of runner-up Alpo to be the top canned dog food, by 1995?
What acoustic-guitar picker turned a homespun cassette into the million-selling LP Armadillo?
